server/db/supabase.js.title: Supabase: Service Role Key in Client Code
server/db/supabase.js.description: Service role key bypasses RLS entirely. Never expose it in client-side code.
server/db/supabase.js.fix: Use the anon key on the client. Move service_role operations to a backend/edge function.

server/db/supabase.js.title: Supabase: Service Role Key in Client Code
server/db/supabase.js.description: Service role key bypasses RLS entirely. Never expose it in client-side code.
server/db/supabase.js.fix: Use the anon key on the client. Move service_role operations to a backend/edge function.

server/db/supabase.js.title: Supabase: Service Role Key in Client Code
server/db/supabase.js.description: Service role key bypasses RLS entirely. Never expose it in client-side code.
server/db/supabase.js.fix: Use the anon key on the client. Move service_role operations to a backend/edge function.

package.json.title: Possible Typosquat: "vite" (similar to "vue")
package.json.description: Package "vite" is 2 character(s) away from popular package "vue". This could be a typosquatting attempt.
package.json.fix: Verify this is the intended package. Did you mean "vue"?

package.json.title: Scoped Packages Without Registry Pin: @react-three, @vitest, @vitejs
package.json.description: Scoped packages (@react-three, @vitest, @vitejs) found without a .npmrc pinning the scope to a private registry. An attacker could claim the scope on the public npm registry.

server/routes/stripe.js.title: API: Route Without Auth Check
server/routes/stripe.js.description: State-changing API route without visible auth middleware. Verify authentication is enforced.
server/routes/stripe.js.fix: Add auth middleware: router.post("/api/data", authMiddleware, handler)

server/routes/stripe.js.title: API: Stack Trace in Response
server/routes/stripe.js.description: Error details sent in API response leak internal information.
server/routes/stripe.js.fix: Log errors server-side. Return generic message: res.status(500).json({ error: "Internal error" })

server/jobs/outbox-dispatcher.js.title: Supabase: RLS Bypass via .rpc() or Admin Client
server/jobs/outbox-dispatcher.js.description: Supabase .rpc() calls execute database functions that may bypass RLS policies.
server/jobs/outbox-dispatcher.js.fix: Ensure the underlying SQL function uses SECURITY DEFINER carefully, or set search_path.

server/routes/auth.js.title: Agent: Destructive Tools Without Human Confirmation
server/routes/auth.js.description: Agent configured to auto-execute tools without human confirmation. Prompt injection can trigger destructive actions.
server/routes/auth.js.fix: Require human-in-the-loop confirmation for destructive operations (write, delete, send, pay).

server/routes/auth.js.title: Agent: Destructive Tools Without Human Confirmation
server/routes/auth.js.description: Agent configured to auto-execute tools without human confirmation. Prompt injection can trigger destructive actions.
server/routes/auth.js.fix: Require human-in-the-loop confirmation for destructive operations (write, delete, send, pay).

server/routes/auth.js.title: Agent: Destructive Tools Without Human Confirmation
server/routes/auth.js.description: Agent configured to auto-execute tools without human confirmation. Prompt injection can trigger destructive actions.
server/routes/auth.js.fix: Require human-in-the-loop confirmation for destructive operations (write, delete, send, pay).

server/routes/auth.js.title: No Rate Limiting on Authentication
server/routes/auth.js.description: Auth endpoints without rate limiting are vulnerable to brute-force attacks.
server/routes/auth.js.fix: Add rate limiting: express-rate-limit, @upstash/ratelimit, or Cloudflare rules

server/routes/auth.js.title: No Rate Limiting on Authentication
server/routes/auth.js.description: Auth endpoints without rate limiting are vulnerable to brute-force attacks.
server/routes/auth.js.fix: Add rate limiting: express-rate-limit, @upstash/ratelimit, or Cloudflare rules

server/services/email.js.title: Privacy: PII Logged to Console
server/services/email.js.description: PII fields logged to console. Log output may be stored in log aggregation services, exposing sensitive user data.
server/services/email.js.matched: console.warn('[email] EMAIL_HOST/USER/PASS not set — skipping email
server/services/email.js.fix: Remove PII from log statements. Use structured logging with PII redaction: logger.info({ userId: user.id }) instead of logging full user objects.

server/services/email.js.title: Privacy: Real Email Address Hardcoded
server/services/email.js.description: Real email address hardcoded in source code (not @example.com). May be PII or a credential.
server/services/email.js.fix: Use @example.com for test emails. Store real emails in environment variables or config.

src/hooks/useSubdomain.ts.title: SSRF: Internal IP Pattern
src/hooks/useSubdomain.ts.description: Internal IP address in code. Verify it is not reachable via user-controlled URLs.
src/hooks/useSubdomain.ts.fix: Block private IP ranges in URL validation for user-supplied URLs

server/app.js.title: API: No Request Body Size Limit
server/app.js.description: No body size limit configured. Large payloads can cause memory exhaustion.
server/app.js.fix: Set limit: express.json({ limit: "1mb" })

server/app.js.title: API: Stack Trace in Response
server/app.js.description: Error details sent in API response leak internal information.
server/app.js.fix: Log errors server-side. Return generic message: res.status(500).json({ error: "Internal error" })

server/app.js.title: API: Missing Security Headers (Helmet)
server/app.js.description: Express app without helmet middleware. Missing security headers (CSP, HSTS, etc.).
server/app.js.fix: Add helmet: app.use(helmet()) for automatic security headers

../AppData/Roaming/Claude/claude_desktop.title: MCP: 1 Shadow Server(s) in User Config
../AppData/Roaming/Claude/claude_desktop.description: Found 1 MCP server(s) configured outside the project in C:\Users\athar\AppData\Roaming\Claude\claude_desktop_config.json. These operate outside your project's security controls.
../AppData/Roaming/Claude/claude_desktop.fix: Review shadow MCP servers. Move project-specific servers to the project mcp.json and track in version control.
